title: heptapleurum borneense
intro: Heptapleurum borneense, also known as Borneo fern, is a species of flowering plant in the family Araliaceae, native to Borneo. The plant is used in traditional medicine, particularly in Southeast Asia, for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Heptapleurum borneense include reducing fever, relieving pain and inflammation, and treating various infections and skin conditions. Heptapleurum borneense can be prepared as herbal tea, decoction, or infusion, and is also used in traditional remedies in the form of tinctures or extracts.
